历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3444 → 3818 → 3695 → 4181, showing a fluctuating and declining trend, with a cumulative decline of about 737 positions over the past 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 4181; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 47 in 2022, 48 in 2023, 47 in 2024, and 53 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 57, an increase of 4 (+7.5%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has been rising steadily, from 76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026, with a steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the recognition of the university's comprehensive strength; in 2022, there was a negative reputation due to academic misconduct, but no major negative public opinion has been seen in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking is 75th (average), with short video exposure at a mid-level, showing no clear signal of increased application attention; Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, and Grassland Science are all A- level, with a total of 4 A- disciplines, featuring distinct agricultural and forestry characteristics, which have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science and Electrical Engineering have consistently high social popularity, while agricultural and forestry majors have average popularity; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 66,000 (including uncertain markings), with an estimated Physics Category of about 45,000 based on historical proportions; the university is located in Xianyang City, Shaanxi, adjacent to Ningxia, with high regional proximity, which has some appeal to Ningxia candidates; the university's enrollment plan in Ningxia accounts for a small proportion, which is normal for cross-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant decline in the 2025 ranking, the 7.5% expansion in 2026 slightly easing competition, the steady rise in Soft Science ranking enhancing the university's appeal, and the basically unchanged total number of candidates, the predicted minimum ranking is about 4400, with a range of 3900–4900.
